summary: Sens. Johnson and Lee write to CDC Director Walensky and FDA Acting Commissioner Woodcock raising concerns about reports of adverse events following COVID-19 vaccination.
body: Sen. Johnson and Sen. Mike Lee send a letter to CDC Director Dr. Rochelle Walensky and FDA Acting Commissioner Dr. Janet Woodcock raising concerns about several hundred individuals who reported experiencing an adverse event after receiving a COVID-19 vaccine.[^fn-267]
